title: Acadia Reports Q1 2025 Revenue Growth and Reaffirms 2025 Outlook
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reported Q1 2025 financial results with strong revenue growth. NUPLAZID net product sales were $159.7 million, up 23% year-over-year. The 23% year-over-year increase included 6% volume growth in 2025 compared to 2024. DAYBUE also showed continued momentum in Q1 2025. The company reaffirmed its 2025 guidance for total revenues between $1.03 and $1.095 billion. NUPLAZID guidance remains $650-$690 million for the year. DAYBUE U.S. sales guidance remains $380-$405 million. Management emphasized the importance of continued market penetration and patient awareness initiatives. The strong Q1 performance set up positive momentum for the remainder of 2025.
